title: Student-athlete Julian Farber finds a support system in the Wilson College of Business
summary_en: From NCAA Championship runs to mastering the global supply chain, Julian Farber proves grit built on the wrestling mat creates leaders ready for business and beyond.

title: Accelerated BSN at University of Northern Iowa now enrolling for fall launch
summary_en: The University of Northern Iowa is now enrolling students for its new Accelerated Bachelor of Science in Nursing (ABSN) program, set to launch in August 2026.

title: Anne Lefter named executive director of the Gallagher Bluedorn Performing Arts Center
summary_en: The University of Northern Iowa is pleased to welcome Anne Lefter as the new executive director of the Gallagher Bluedorn Performing Arts Center.
title_cn: 北爱荷华大学任命安妮·莱夫特为加拉格尔·布卢多恩表演艺术中心执行主任

title: UNI Division of Graduate Studies Hosts Annual Event Celebrating Excellence
summary_en: The University of Northern Iowa’s Division of Graduate Studies honored outstanding graduate  students, faculty and staff during the annual graduate faculty meeting, an event recognizing individuals whose leadership, service and achievements have made a significant impact on the UNI graduate education community.
